violations.text: The doors to the outside, located at the front and back of building, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025
The floors in the kitchen and storage areas are in poor repair (need resealing). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2026

Wood is used in the construction of desks (storage space) in the food prep and 3 bay sink areas. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2024
The faucet head to the food prep sink is in poor repair. Water observed running with water knobs in off position. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the milk cooler gaskets have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2023
